title: Tiny Bees
description: Visually shrinks all bee's tinier size
body:
![modlogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e5cd314f2632da9baa40ec5987c07652a4e690b.png)

---

is a simple Fabric mod that makes all bees look more tiny. It gives the game a more proportionately "vanilla-feeling" aesthetic without the giant default bees.

---

**Tiny Bee**

![TinyBee](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a49a54b9e3e6c07c858fc46f3cfb57d1f291ed1.png) 

**Normal Bee**

![Normalbee](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/575fd215785baf7183f7a37f818f78f7167b12eb.png)

---

**Features**

*Visuals & Mechanics*
* Tiny Aesthetics - Changes the visual size and hitbox so both adult and baby bees have a consistent scale of `0.5`.
* Fully Functional - Bees retain all vanilla mechanics. They can still grow up, breed, gather pollen, and produce honey exactly as they do in the base game. Only their physical size is changed.
